title: How Cursor builds agentic workflows across the SDLC
summary: Tido Carriero, VP of Engineering at Cursor, discusses how to scale AI-assisted coding beyond the 40% productivity plateau by building agent systems across the entire SDLC. He describes the architecture of agents for bug triage, security review, growth experiments, and PM/EM functions, and argues that the bottleneck is not coding itself but the broader development lifecycle.
